item.title: Reddit is so freaking cool
item.description:
Some snorkeler found a section of a rocket booster on the beach in Honduras and ask for identification. The tech who helped build the rocket responded almost immediately with identification information.
https://www.reddit.com/r/space/s/IDx973ybSd

item.title: Oops, I dropped these.
item.description:
Meownager*
Jesus saying that bread was his body makes more sense now.
Big fan of Sonic.
Spider-Man, Clank, or Gregg?
*schlorp*
“BM-Dub uwu” in my head.
RISE
* ᵃⁿᵍᵉʳʸ*
Who you gonna call?
I only receive constructive criticism in the form of compliments.
Cat tax.

item.dc:creator: GingerSnark

item.title: I'm going to be a street vendor during my city's largest and most beloved festival of the whole year!
item.description:
I'm still in such disbelief and it's less than 2 weeks away already!
I had to shake my head really hard when I saw this list. It's SO SHORT! How was I accepted?? I feel so lucky and honored to be on that very short list. I just can't believe I made it here!
This is exactly me pointing at my name on the list. Thank you all so much for your support. This community is how I got started in the first place, so I really wanted to share my joy here with you all! It's been over 4 years since this journey began and I cannot wait to see just how far I can take it. If anyone is curious, I've got an Etsy shop where you cam find most of what I offer. Some things I don't have listed yet, I plan to do a little shop renovation once Harvest is over. I also love taking commissions and making custom pieces, so please don't hesitate to inquire! https://evilcatcreations.etsy.com Thanks for looking and happy scrolling!
item.dc:creator: EvilCatCreations

item.title: Images of Note: Tofu
item.description:
You look down the sight only to get whacked in the eye
Which is basically what the Tory party did in my country.
Lots of shit happens in the Forest of Dean.
please let that video have been fictional.
owo
this is cursed
Whore.
The fact that the right, especially in America, are pivoting toward wanting to coerce or force women into having children they cannot afford or do not want should concern every single person.
Ok so those masc women include: * A Goth * A bubbly Police Officer * A muscly Lawyer * Dunno * The head of state of her country during a war threatening the very existence of her realm * A Stoic Bisexual * An eccentric member of the Holmes family. * An assassin so skilled she earned a space on the top superhero team alongside a literal God, a super soldier, and the Hulk. * A woman with Autism. Whoever thinks that's masc has a view of femininity so narrow JK Rowling is telling you to slow down.
This is why Hitler failed to get into Art School.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: I'm in a remote rural town with almost 0 light pollution. Trying my hand at astrophotography.
item.description:
Just very basic stuff. I'm taking this with just a tripod stabilized phone camera.
Came out nice though. Maybe I'll invest in some better gear and see what I can produce.
item.dc:creator: NuArcher

item.title: On this Labor Day, celebrate with trans furry memes!
item.description: Thor wants you to share your burger.
item.dc:creator: SillySnowFox

item.title: Wally was a bait dog. He spent his life in a cage, only being let out to be put in a ring and torn apart by fighting dogs. They tossed him out when his foot was ripped off, and he no longer filled the role. We found him in a remote animal rescue.
item.description:
Wally's missing foot. No one is allowed near his stub except my wife. He now trusts her to care for something that hurts so easily. Three bones are floating in that stub. I sat on it by accident once, and he was traumatized for days. He forgave it took months before he let me sit next to him without his getting up.
It was clear in his eyes he was defeated by life. It was also clear in his eyes he was in there. When I saw that light there was no way we were leaving without him.
It took over seven months for him to trust. His PTSD caused him to bark at anything he heard. He didn't know how to dog. All he knows now is how to love. He is at peace. He's forgiven the world for what it did to him. He protects the family at every turn. Even now, I can't enter the bedroom without him storming in front of me to make sure my wife is protected. This is love like we've never seen.
Noble, loyal, and a member of a pack.
All he ever wanted was love and a warm place to sleep. Now he'll have that for the rest of his life.
item.dc:creator: BumpSplat

item.title: "You are the most beautiful ship in the world." -USS Independence
item.description: “Amerigo Vespucci, you are still the most beautiful ship in the world!” -USS George H.W. Bush, 60 years later https://www.c6f.navy.mil/Press-Room/News/Article/3148858/strengthening-partnerships-recreating-history-george-hw-bush-sails-alongside-am/
